businessContext_i18n.fr: Impédance de la ligne de transmission.
businessContext_i18n.es: Impedancia de la línea de transmisión.

rules: All numeric inputs must be positive numbers.

formulas.sonuc: (1 + Math.abs((yukEmpedans - hatEmpedans) / Math.max(0.0001, (yukEmpedans + hatEmpedans)))) / Math.max(0.0001, (1 - Math.abs((yukEmpedans - hatEmpedans) / Math.max(0.0001, (yukEmpedans + hatEmpedans)))))

sonuc.es: ROE (Relación de Onda Estacionaria de Voltaje)

hiddenLossDrivers: Low Q factor indicates broader frequency response.
suggestedActions: Verify component tolerances affect circuit performance.
Use proper safety equipment for high voltage/current work.

description.short: Calculate Voltage Standing Wave Ratio (VSWR) from impedance mismatch.
description.long: Calculate Voltage Standing Wave Ratio (VSWR) from impedance mismatch.

short_i18n.en: Calculate Voltage Standing Wave Ratio (VSWR) from impedance mismatch.
short_i18n.tr: İletim hattındaki empedans uyumsuzluk oranını (VSWR) hesaplar.
short_i18n.de: Berechnen Sie das Spannungs-Stehwellenverhältnis (VSWR) aus der Impedanzfehlanpassung.
short_i18n.fr: Calculer le rapport d'ondes stationnaires de tension (VSWR) à partir d'une désadaptation d'impédance.
short_i18n.es: Calcular la relación de onda estacionaria de voltaje (VSWR) a partir del desajuste de impedancia.
short_i18n.ar: حساب نسبة موجة الوقوف للجهد (VSWR) من عدم تطابق المعاوقة.
